sharedRules.noEmojis: No emojis in code, comments, UI, logs, or documentation
sharedRules.featureBasedModules: Organize code by feature, not by layer
sharedRules.researchFirst: Use Context7 MCP + Brave Search before ANY implementation. Document findings.
sharedRules.workflowEnforced: Commit → Push → Update JSON → Write Report. In that order.
sharedRules.testBeforeComplete: Run full test suite before marking step complete. All tests must pass.
sharedRules.fullyImplemented: No placeholders, TODOs, or incomplete code. Everything must work.
sharedRules.modularArchitecture: Keep files under 250 lines. Split when needed.
sharedRules.seoOptimized: All frontend pages must have proper meta tags, structured data, and semantic HTML
sharedRules.apiVersioning: All APIs must be versioned (v1, v2) with backward compatibility policy

phases.name: Enterprise-Grade Critical Fixes
phases.description: Foundation: Security, reliability, compliance. Must complete before anything else.

phases.name: Reliability & Messaging Hardening
phases.description: Bulletproof messaging: WebSocket, retries, validation, metrics

phases.name: Payment & Billing System
phases.description: Complete Stripe billing: subscriptions, invoices, tax, usage tracking

phases.name: API & Developer Experience
phases.description: OpenAPI, SDKs, developer portal, webhooks, API security

phases.name: Super Admin & Monitoring Dashboard
phases.description: Admin UI: metrics, tenants, revenue, alerts, audit logs

phases.name: Testing & Quality Assurance
phases.description: Unit, integration, E2E, load, security, mutation testing

phases.name: Advanced UX & Features
phases.description: Real-time WebSocket, reactions, search, dark mode, AI, analytics, A/B testing

phases.name: Deployment & Production Readiness
phases.description: Terraform, CI/CD, SOC2, backups, DR, monitoring, rollback safety
